block.header: sumye ra ga opo mikoto rama to nori tamapa ku sore yatukwo to ipu mono pa kimi ni sitagapi te kiywo ku sadaka ni aka ki kokoro wo moti te kimi wo tasuke mamori mukapi te pa wiya na ki omo p yeri na ku usiro ni pa sosiru koto na ku kadami itupa ri peturapi magar e ru kokoro na ku site tukape maturu be ki mono ni ari

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@天皇良我御命良麻止詔久夫臣下等云,*

sentence.kanji: 天皇良我御命良麻止詔久夫臣下等云
sentence.transcription: sumye ra ga opo mikoto rama to nori tamapa ku sore yatukwo to ipu
mono pa kimi ni sitagapi te
kiywo ku
sadaka ni aka ki
kokoro wo moti te
kimi wo tasuke mamori mukapi te pa
wiya na ki
omo p yeri na ku
usiro ni pa sosiru
koto na ku
kadami itupa ri peturapi magar e ru
kokoro na ku site
tukape maturu be ki
mono ni ari

block.header: sikaru mono wo piro ki itu tu no kurawi no simo tu sina inaba no kuni no kazu ywori poka no suke pudino no ma pito kiywo maro so ga ane popu kun to ito opo ki ni asi ku kadam ye ru itupari goto wo tukuri te ware ni mukapi te popukun i mono mawos e ri

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@3,IP-ADV,PP,NP,NP,1@五位下因幡国員外介輔治能真人清麻呂其我姉法均止甚大尔悪久姦流,*

sentence.transcription: sikaru mono wo piro ki

sentence.kanji: 五位下因幡国員外介輔治能真人清麻呂其我姉法均止甚大尔悪久姦流
sentence.transcription: itu tu no kurawi no simo tu sina inaba no kuni no kazu ywori poka no suke pudino no ma pito kiywo maro so ga ane popu kun to ito opo ki ni asi ku kadam ye ru
itupari goto wo tukuri te
ware ni mukapi te
popukun i mono mawos e ri

block.header: ko wo mi ru ni omote no iro katati kuti ni ipu koto napo akiraka ni ono ga tukuri te ipu koto wo opo kamwi no opo mikoto to kari te ipu to sira si myesi nu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,4@言乎大神乃御命止借天,*

sentence.transcription: ko wo mi ru ni
omote no iro katati kuti ni ipu
koto napo akiraka ni
ono ga tukuri te ipu

sentence.kanji: 言乎大神乃御命止借天
sentence.transcription: koto wo opo kamwi no opo mikoto to kari te
ipu to sira si myesi nu

block.header: twopi motomuru ni wa ga omopo site aru ga goto ku opo mi kamwi no opo mikoto ni pa ara zu to kikosi myesi sadame tu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@問求仁朕所念之天在何如久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@3,IP-ADV,1@大神乃御命尔波不在止聞行定都,*

sentence.kanji: 問求仁朕所念之天在何如久
sentence.transcription: twopi motomuru ni wa ga omopo site aru ga goto ku

sentence.kanji: 大神乃御命尔波不在止聞行定都
sentence.transcription: opo mi kamwi no opo mikoto ni pa ara zu to kikosi myesi sadame tu

block.header: kare koko wo motite nori no ma ni ma sirizoke tamapu to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@故是以法乃麻尔麻退給止詔布,*

sentence.kanji: 故是以法乃麻尔麻退給止詔布
sentence.transcription: kare koko wo motite nori no ma ni ma sirizoke tamapu to noritama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku ko no koto pa pito no mawosi te aru ni mo ara zu tada koto so no kotowari ni ara zu sakasima ni ip yeri

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@復詔久此事方人乃奏天在仁毛不在唯言其理尔不在,*

sentence.kanji: 復詔久此事方人乃奏天在仁毛不在唯言其理尔不在
sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapa ku ko no koto pa pito no mawosi te aru ni mo ara zu tada koto so no kotowari ni ara zu
sakasima ni ip yeri

block.header: omo p yeri mo wiya na ku site ono ga koto wo ire moti wi yo to omopi te ari

sentence.transcription: omo p yeri mo wiya na ku site
ono ga koto wo ire moti wi yo to
omopi te ari

block.header: kore ame tuti no sakasima to ipu ni kore yori masaru pa na si

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@是天地乃逆止云尔此与利増波無,*

sentence.kanji: 是天地乃逆止云尔此与利増波無
sentence.transcription: kore ame tuti no sakasima to ipu ni kore yori masaru pa na si

block.header: sikareba ko pa syo syou tati ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no arapasi tama pi satosi tamapu ni koso a re tare ka ape te ware ni mawosi tamapa mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@此方諸聖等天神地祇現給比悟給尔己曾在礼誰可敢弖,*

sentence.transcription: sikareba

sentence.kanji: 此方諸聖等天神地祇現給比悟給尔己曾在礼誰可敢弖
sentence.transcription: ko pa syo syou tati ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no arapasi tama pi satosi tamapu ni koso a re tare ka ape te
ware ni mawosi tamapa mu

block.header: napo pito pa mawosa zu te are domo kokoro no uti asi ku kitana ku nigori te aru pito pa kanarazu ame tuti no arapa si simyesi tamapi turu mono so

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,3@人波必天地現之示給都留,*

sentence.transcription: napo pito pa mawosa zu te are domo
kokoro no uti asi ku kitana ku
nigori te aru

sentence.kanji: 人波必天地現之示給都留
sentence.transcription: pito pa kanarazu ame tuti no arapa si simyesi tamapi turu
mono so

block.header: koko wo motite pito bito ono ga kokoro wo akiraka ni kiywo ku sadaka ni tutusimi te tukape mature to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@是以人人己何心乎明尔清久,*

sentence.kanji: 是以人人己何心乎明尔清久
sentence.transcription: koko wo motite pito bito ono ga kokoro wo akiraka ni kiywo ku
sadaka ni tutusimi te
tukape mature to noritama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata ko no koto wo siri te kiywo maro ra to api pakari kye mu pito ari to pa sira si myesi te are domo kimi pa utukusibwi wo moti te ame no sita no maturi goto pa okonapi tamapu mono ni imaseba namo utukusi bwi apare mi tamapi te yurusi tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,2@人在止方所知天在止毛,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,5@物尔伊麻世波奈毛慈備愍美給天免給布,*

sentence.transcription: mata ko no koto wo siri te
kiywo maro ra to api pakari kye mu

sentence.kanji: 人在止方所知天在止毛
sentence.transcription: pito ari to pa sira si myesi te are domo
kimi pa utukusibwi wo moti te
ame no sita no maturi goto pa okonapi tamapu

sentence.kanji: 物尔伊麻世波奈毛慈備愍美給天免給布
sentence.transcription: mono ni imaseba namo utukusi bwi apare mi tamapi te yurusi tama pu

block.header: sikaredomo si waza ni kasanari tara mu pito woba nori no ma ni ma wosame tamapa mu mono so

sentence.transcription: sikaredomo si waza ni kasanari tara mu

sentence.kanji: 人乎波法乃麻尔麻収給牟
sentence.transcription: pito woba nori no ma ni ma wosame tamapa mu
mono so

block.header: kaku no sama satori te saki ni kiywo maro ra to kokoro wo oyazi ku site pito tu puta tu no koto mo api pakari kye mu pito domo pa kokoro aratame te akiraka ni sadaka ni aru kokoro wo moti te tukape mature to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: kaku no sama satori te
saki ni
kiywo maro ra to kokoro wo oyazi ku site
pito tu puta tu no koto mo api pakari kye mu
pito domo pa kokoro aratame te
akiraka ni sadaka ni aru
kokoro wo moti te
tukape mature to noritama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata kiywo maro ra pa tukape matu ru yatukwo to omoposi te koso kabane mo tamapi te wosame tamapi te si ka ima pa kitana ki yatukwo to site sirizoke tamapu ni yorite namo tama p yeri si kabane pa tori te wake bye to nasi tamapi te so ga na pa kitana maro to tama pi popukun ga na mo piro musi mye to kapyesi tamapu to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,8@別部止成給弖其我名波穢麻呂止給比,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,9@法均我名毛広虫売止還給止詔布,*

sentence.transcription: mata kiywo maro ra pa tukape matu ru
yatukwo to omoposi te koso
kabane mo tamapi te
wosame tamapi te si ka
ima pa kitana ki

sentence.kanji: 奴止之弖退給尔依奈毛
sentence.transcription: yatukwo to site sirizoke tamapu ni yorite namo
tama p yeri si
kabane pa tori te

sentence.kanji: 別部止成給弖其我名波穢麻呂止給比
sentence.transcription: wake bye to nasi tamapi te so ga na pa kitana maro to tama pi

sentence.kanji: 法均我名毛広虫売止還給止詔布
sentence.transcription: popukun ga na mo piro musi mye to kapyesi tamapu to noritama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata myau kwi pa piro musi mye to mwi pa puta tu ni are domo kokoro pa pito tu ni ari to sira si myesi te namo si ga na mo tori tamapi te oyazi ku sirizoke tamapu to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: mata myau kwi pa piro musi mye to
mwi pa puta tu ni are domo
kokoro pa pito tu ni ari to
sira si myesi te namo
si ga na mo tori tamapi te oyazi ku
sirizoke tamapu to noritama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
